decision.sourceOwner: Replace with accountable source owner before governance review
decision.approvalCaveat: This template is not an official treatment approval or source-owner outcome record.

caveats: Activation timing and scope must come from reviewed planning records.
A planned activation window does not prove treatment execution.
Template values are placeholders and cannot be used as evidence.
Baseline signals must be reviewed before outcome comparison.

followUpSignals.movementRead: Not available until source-owner follow-up evidence is reviewed.
caveats: Follow-up movement is not causal proof.
Missing or incompatible follow-up periods must remain visible.

commercialContextSignals.sourceLabel: Replace with approved commercial context source
commercialContextSignals.read: Optional support context, not treatment efficacy proof.
caveats: Commercial support context cannot prove treatment causality.
Do not infer cannibalization, portfolio migration, or occasion substitution from this record.

efficacyReadiness.confidenceLanguage: No efficacy claim is allowed from this draft template.
blockers: Outcome-record schema is draft-only and not approved.
Follow-up signals are not reviewed or source-period compatible.
Enterprise reviewer identity and canonical learning governance are disabled.
No approved efficacy-summary rule allows treatment effectiveness language.

guardrails: Do not treat this template as evidence that a treatment happened.
Do not claim treatment efficacy, causality, portfolio learning, or canonical pattern memory from this draft.
Do not write this record into an accepted outcome-record store until governance approves the schema, identity, source ownership, and learning store.
Recommendations remain treatment paths to test until reviewed outcome evidence and efficacy rules are approved.
caveats: This is a source-owner and methodology-owner handoff template only.
All placeholder values must be replaced by approved source records before review.
The current runtime must keep outcome learning, treatment outcome claims, accepted outcome-record storage, efficacy summaries, portfolio learning, and canonical learning disabled.
